creative_direction: Dark luxury, electric blue and bronze; Meta advertising systems, data, AI, premium B2B/home-service growth; sophisticated not gimmicky.
important_notes: People shown are AI-generated fictional/composite individuals, not real clients, youth, employees, advisors, or named principals.
Assets are stored in a non-deploy creative-assets folder for editorial review and future implementation.
Prompts intentionally avoid logos, readable text, official seals, named companies, or claims that would require consent.

assets.title: Compounding funnel hero
assets.description: Sculptural compounding-funnel hero: a single elegant matte-black and champagne-gold funnel form with restrained light, no HUD, no interface text.
assets.intended_use: Homepage static/mobile hero fallback or OpenGraph hero candidate.
assets.alt: Glowing blue particles form a structured marketing funnel on a dark background.
assets.prompt: Premium dark-luxury 3D editorial hero image: a single sculptural funnel form machined from matte black metal with brushed champagne-gold edges, refined and iconic, sitting in deep charcoal negative space with cinematic rim light. A restrained stream of fine warm-gold particles descends through it into compounding concentric rings that suggest exponential growth. Minimalist and expensive, sophisticated fine-art product-render quality. No glowing cyan HUD, no interface panels, no charts, no floating polygon shards, no text of any kind. Generous clean space on the left for headline copy. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: absolutely no text, letters, words, numbers, logos, signage, labels, captions, or written characters anywhere in the frame. Every surface that would normally carry text (papers, screens, signs, plaques, folders, book spines) must be blank, turned away from camera, or rendered as pure abstract shapes. Photoreal, natural hands with correct anatomy, no uncanny faces.
assets.regen_reason: v1 had fake HUD/pseudo-text panels and read as generic blue AI sci-fi.

assets.title: Operator dashboard command desk
assets.description: A premium operator/founder figure at a glass desk with glowing acquisition dashboards, no real brand marks.
assets.intended_use: About/system hero for authority and premium partnership.
assets.alt: A marketer works at a dark desk surrounded by glowing dashboards.
assets.prompt: Premium real-life editorial photograph with cinematic dark luxury lighting: high-ticket marketing operator at glass desk reviewing glowing campaign dashboards on monitors, electric blue and bronze accents, face not identifiable, sharp suit-casual styling, no platform logos, no readable text, sophisticated $100K agency website feel

assets.title: Home service lead-flow visualization
assets.description: Premium home-service scene at dusk — a clean unbranded work truck at an upscale home — with only a whisper of abstract lead-flow light, no graphic funnel, no words.
assets.intended_use: Home Services tab visual or case-study hero.
assets.alt: A home service truck scene with subtle glowing lead-flow graphics.
assets.prompt: Premium cinematic marketing photograph: a clean, well-detailed unbranded work truck parked in the driveway of an upscale suburban home at dusk, warm interior lights glowing in the windows, realistic reflections and materials. Only a very subtle, tasteful scatter of small electric-blue light nodes drifts near the driveway to hint at customer flow. No large funnel graphic, no diagram, no words, no labels, no logos on the truck or house. Deep charcoal grade with a single bronze highlight, sophisticated high-ticket feel, photoreal. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: absolutely no text, letters, words, numbers, logos, signage, labels, captions, or written characters anywhere in the frame. Every surface that would normally carry text (papers, screens, signs, plaques, folders, book spines) must be blank, turned away from camera, or rendered as pure abstract shapes. Photoreal, natural hands with correct anatomy, no uncanny faces.
assets.regen_reason: v1 had a cheesy oversized funnel/"OWNERSHIP/ACQUISITION" text overlay and weak truck realism.

assets.title: B2B pipeline war room
assets.description: Dark premium B2B strategy room seen so the team reads as confident silhouettes; wall screens show only clean abstract glowing curves, no readable UI.
assets.intended_use: B2B/high-ticket segment visual and results page.
assets.alt: A B2B team reviews pipeline dashboards in a dark strategy room.
assets.prompt: Premium dark editorial photograph: a B2B leadership team in a glass strategy room at dusk, shown mostly as confident back-lit silhouettes and from behind so faces are not the focus and hands are not prominently raised. Large wall screens display only clean abstract glowing electric-blue curves and soft gradient shapes, absolutely no readable labels, numbers, words, or UI text. City skyline beyond the glass, bronze edge accents, serious high-ticket authority, cinematic dark-luxury grade. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: absolutely no text, letters, words, numbers, logos, signage, labels, captions, or written characters anywhere in the frame. Every surface that would normally carry text (papers, screens, signs, plaques, folders, book spines) must be blank, turned away from camera, or rendered as pure abstract shapes. Photoreal, natural hands with correct anatomy, no uncanny faces.
assets.regen_reason: v1 had garbled dashboard microtext, soft AI faces, and uncanny gesturing hands.

assets.title: Creative engine studio
assets.description: A premium content studio setup with phones, lighting, storyboard cards, and campaign energy.
assets.intended_use: System Phase 2 visual for creative/content engine.
assets.alt: A dark content studio with phones, lights, and campaign storyboard cards.
assets.prompt: High-end dark luxury editorial image of a performance-marketing creative studio: phones on tripods, softbox lights, storyboard cards blurred, glowing blue campaign nodes floating subtly, bronze trim, organized creative engine, no logos, no readable text, premium Meta ads agency aesthetic

assets.title: AI targeting neural map

assets.title: Results analytics wall
assets.description: Dark-luxury analytics wall of purely abstract upward-sweeping glowing curves and funnel arcs — zero labels, numbers, or words.
assets.alt: A dark analytics wall shows glowing upward performance charts.
assets.prompt: Premium dark-luxury analytics-wall hero for a high-ticket marketing agency: a glossy black glass wall showing purely abstract upward-sweeping glowing curves, stacked funnel arcs, and soft signal clusters in electric blue with champagne-gold accents. Completely abstract data art with absolutely no numbers, no axis labels, no words, no headings, no UI text of any kind. Deep black room, cinematic reflections, crisp and expensive, 16:9 hero composition with clean space for overlay copy. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: absolutely no text, letters, words, numbers, logos, signage, labels, captions, or written characters anywhere in the frame. Every surface that would normally carry text (papers, screens, signs, plaques, folders, book spines) must be blank, turned away from camera, or rendered as pure abstract shapes. Photoreal, natural hands with correct anatomy, no uncanny faces.

assets.title: Selective partnership boardroom
assets.description: A private high-end boardroom scene suggesting application-only selectivity and serious partnership.
assets.intended_use: Apply page hero or final CTA visual.
assets.alt: A private dark boardroom prepared for a selective partnership meeting.
assets.prompt: Premium cinematic photograph of a private dark boardroom prepared for a selective marketing partnership meeting, glass table, one open laptop with abstract blue glow, bronze details, empty chairs, exclusivity and authority, no logos, no readable text, high-ticket B2B aesthetic

assets.title: Chaos into compounding funnel
assets.description: Dark-luxury motion hero: a sculptural matte-black and champagne-gold funnel present from the first frame, warm gold particles streaming down into compounding gold rings with intentional directional motion.
assets.intended_use: Homepage video hero or mobile pre-rendered fallback.
assets.alt: Video of glowing particles organizing into a structured marketing funnel.
assets.prompt: Cinematic 8-second dark-luxury abstract web hero video. From the VERY FIRST FRAME a single sculptural funnel machined from matte black metal with brushed champagne-gold edges is centered in deep charcoal space; warm champagne-gold particles with only a few restrained electric-blue accents stream downward through the funnel into compounding concentric gold growth rings. Elegant, intentional, clearly directional motion drawing the eye down through the funnel — refined and iconic, never a random particle storm or starfield. Palette is predominantly matte black and champagne gold. No cyan HUD clutter, no interface panels, no polygon shards, no text or numbers anywhere. CRITICAL: no text, letters, numbers, logos, or signage anywhere; all signs/plaques/screens blank or abstract. Photoreal, smooth motion, silent web hero loop.
assets.regen_reason: Round-2: the "chaos" opening read as a generic blue data-storm in the wrong palette. Put the sculptural matte-black/champagne-gold funnel in frame from the first frame with gold-dominant, directional motion.

assets.title: Campaign dashboard pan
assets.description: Slow cinematic pan across a dark-glass command surface showing only abstract glowing curves and funnel arcs — no readable labels or numbers.
assets.intended_use: System/results video hero; communicates optimization and scale.
assets.alt: Video pans across a dark campaign dashboard with glowing charts and creative cards.
assets.prompt: Premium 8-second cinematic web hero video: a slow lateral pan across a dark glass command surface where abstract glowing electric-blue curves, funnel arcs and soft signal clusters rise elegantly, bronze highlights catching the edges. The graphics are purely abstract with absolutely no readable numbers, labels, words, or UI text anywhere. Luxurious high-ticket marketing feel, deep charcoal grade, smooth confident camera move. CRITICAL: no text, letters, numbers, logos, or signage anywhere; all signs/plaques/screens blank or abstract. Photoreal, smooth motion, silent web hero loop.
assets.regen_reason: v1 had garbled/fake dashboard microtext throughout the pan.

revision_notes.note: Regenerated 6 assets that failed creative-director QA (garbled pseudo-text on props/screens, one Idaho-geography fix, and generic sci-fi cleanup). Fixes applied compositionally: text-bearing surfaces removed, turned away, blanked, or made abstract.
Round-2 regeneration of 1 video(s) that still failed QA after round 1. Fixed by removing the triggering environment (interior-only library shot; single-building tight frame; funnel-from-first-frame).
